text:
There once was a young man named Tom who loved fishing. He would wake up early each morning eagerly anticipating the first bite he'd take.

One summer day, while exploring the lakes surrounded by ancient forests, Tom discovered an old worn-down boat moored off the bank. It belonged to an eccentric fisherman named Oliver.

Oliver claimed the boat was cursed. Whenever he rowed it too close to the waterfall at the edge of town, something terrible happened. It never stayed seawards long.

However, Tom thought this might be fun. He paddled out and invited Oliver aboard. Oliver humored him.

They rowed silently for an hour. Suddenly, Oliver paused. A big rainbow trout broke through the water. Oliver laughed. "You dare?"

But strangely enchanting. Tom couldn't bear the idea. "I'd love that."

With courage Tom steered the boat closer. Oliver couldn't believe his eyes; a huge trout let himself be caught effortlessly.

They watched as Tom expertly
